daily_summary.headline: Exciting Space Events Await: Starship Test and Aurora Displays

top_events.title: Starship | Flight 12
top_events.description: 12th test flight of the two-stage Starship launch vehicle. Maiden Flight of Starship V3.
top_events.action: Watch live for groundbreaking test flight.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: G1 geomagnetic storm expected, visible to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check skies if you're above 60° latitude.

top_events.title: Vega-C | SMILE Mission
top_events.description: Launch of the Solar wind Magnetosphere Ionosphere Link Explorer (SMILE) to study Earth's magnetosphere.
top_events.action: Follow the mission for insights into Earth's magnetic shield.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
